fragments.summary: Persisted runtime should merge fixture fragments with stored memory.
fragments.full_text: Persisted runtime should merge fixture fragments with stored memory. This older guidance kept bootstrap fixture data in runtime retrieval.

fragments.summary: Persisted runtime should use Dolt fragment nodes as canonical source.
fragments.full_text: Persisted runtime should use Dolt fragment nodes as canonical source. Keep fixture use explicit for stateless dev flows and tests.

fragments.summary: Show Athena history as flat fragment rows.
fragments.full_text: Show Athena history as flat fragment rows. This older guidance flattened packet and event history.

fragments.summary: Group Athena history by packet and feedback event.
fragments.full_text: Group Athena history by packet and feedback event. Packet timeline is clearer than flat fragment rows.

fragments.summary: Run long benchmarks once purpose sounds roughly right.
fragments.full_text: Run long benchmarks once purpose sounds roughly right. This older guidance is too permissive.

fragments.summary: Stop before long benchmark if orientation is unresolved.
fragments.full_text: Stop before long benchmark if orientation is unresolved. Expensive work needs a clearer stop/go rule.

fragments.summary: Read tests first to infer intended design.
fragments.full_text: Read tests first to infer intended design. This older guidance over-trusts current behavior.

fragments.summary: Start design gap audits from schema and plan docs.
fragments.full_text: Start design gap audits from schema and plan docs. Use docs before tests when intended design is question.
